1 #include "Navigation.hpp"
2 #include <ros/ros.h>
3 
4 static const uint8_t RATE_HZ{10};
5 
6 int main(int argc, char** argv) {
7  // Initialize rosbuzz node
8  ros::init(argc, argv, "navigation");
9 
10  std::shared_ptr<ros::NodeHandle> nodeHandle(new ros::NodeHandle(""));
11 
12  // Initialize and start node execution
13  Navigation navigation(nodeHandle);
14 
15  ros::Rate loopRate(RATE_HZ);
16 
17  while (ros::ok()) {
18  ros::spinOnce();
19 
20  navigation.execute();
21 
22  loopRate.sleep();
23  }
24 
25  return 0;
26 }
